lotListEmpty: No parking lots with available spaces.
trafficNoLocation: Click "My Location" to check parking rules at your current position.
trafficAllClear: Your current location is not in a restricted area. You may park if you follow general regulations.
trafficNearbyAreas: Your location is near {{count}} regulated areas:
rule1: Park close to the right curb, no more than 0.25m from the curb
rule2: No parking within 5m of an intersection
rule3: No parking on bridges, underpasses, or unauthorized sidewalks
rule4: No parking in front of government buildings or bus stops
rule5: No parking on single-lane narrow roads
qrEntryNote: Use this QR to check in. Valid for 4 hours.
qrExitNote: Use this QR to check out. Late checkout will incur an extra charge.
qrSaveNote: Save this QR to scan at the parking lot gate. Valid for 4 hours.
qrShowNote: Show this QR code to the staff at the parking lot gate for entry.
checkoutPaidDurationCost: Amount already paid for reserved duration
checkoutThankYou: Thank you for using our service!
alreadyBookedTitle: You have a booking at this lot!
authLoginRequired: Please log in or register before booking or viewing your history.
legendNote:
* Click on roads to view regulation details
* Select vehicle type to filter restricted zones
parkingLawSubtitle: This page keeps the parking guidance separate, so the map stays focused on lots and parking points.
parkingLawSourceText: Vietnam Road Traffic Order and Safety Law 2024 and Decree 168/2024/ND-CP. Users should still follow on-site signs, markings, and official instructions first.
parkingLawSafe1: Signal clearly when entering or leaving a stopping/parking position.
parkingLawSafe2: Do not obstruct pedestrians, other vehicles, entrances, houses, agencies, or parking-lot access.
parkingLawSafe3: Cars should use the parking brake or another safety measure; on slopes, steer toward the curb and chock wheels when needed.
parkingLawSafe4: Prefer managed lots with a ticket/QR code or a Book button in SmartParking.
parkingLawAvoid1: Left side of one-way streets, curves, hill crests, or places with limited visibility.
parkingLawAvoid2: Bridges, underpasses, pedestrian crossings, intersections, or within 5m of an intersection edge.
parkingLawAvoid3: Passenger pick-up/drop-off points, bus stops, agency gates, or roads only wide enough for one lane.
parkingLawAvoid4: Places blocking signs, traffic lights, drains, technical tunnels, or fire-water access points.
parkingLawAvoid5: Areas with “No parking” or “No stopping and parking” signs; on-site signs override app guidance.
parkingLawSmart1: Paid/managed lots appear in the parking-lot list and include a Book button.
parkingLawSmart2: Free points only support map viewing and directions; they do not support reservations.
parkingLawSmart3: After booking, keep the QR code for gate entry/exit and confirm the license plate.
parkingLawSmart4: If a lot is full, choose the nearest available lot or navigate to a free parking point.
parkingLawFine1: Car parking violations in common cases may be fined around 800,000 – 1,000,000 VND.
parkingLawFine2: Motorbike stopping/parking violations may be fined from 400,000 VND upward depending on the case.
parkingLawFine3: Fine levels can change, so this page is only a quick in-app reminder.
parkingLawDisclaimer: Note: SmartParking supports lookup and reservations; it does not replace official instructions or on-site traffic signs.
